extraction.one_line_summary: ROGLIČ attacked the flat headwind section with pure power, paced the climb perfectly, and reclaimed red with 39 seconds over CARAPAZ who disintegrated on the final ascent.
tactical_patterns: ROGLIČ paced flat 30km headwind aggressively instead of conserving for climb, breaking GC climbers before steep gradient
CARAPAZ tried matching ROGLIČ on flat sections and paid catastrophically on final climb, losing 49 seconds
BARTA nearly won by combining cyclocross-quality bike change skills with high-cadence climbing after 38 minutes at threshold
CARTHY moved into podium by avoiding CARAPAZ mistake of overextending on flat headwind sections

rider_signals.ROGLIČ Primož: positive: delivered redemption ITT win after Tour collapse, showing Tour loss didn't break morale or diesel engine
rider_signals.BARTA Will: positive: matched ROGLIČ power for 38km then executed flawless bike change, only lost stage by 1 second on final climb
rider_signals.CARAPAZ Richard: negative: tactical error trying to match power riders on flat headwind, collapsed 49 seconds on climb he should dominate
rider_signals.CARTHY Hugh: positive: rode disciplined ITT respecting limitations on flat, consolidated podium position without overextending
